products.details:
AVG Internet Security includes Internet Security for Windows, AntiVirus for Android and AntiVirus for Mac.
Antivirus – Keep your essential and most popular software always up to date
Ransomware Protection – Wall off personal photos & files from ransomware attacks
Anti-Spam – Block spam, scams, & phishing email.

Essential antivirus protection for your PC so you can browse, bank, and shop safely online McAfee® AntiVirus, award-winning protection for your PC whenever you’re online.
With a quick install and our always up to date security, it blocks threats using antivirus that’s verified by independent tests
Now backed by our 100% Guarantee: a McAfee expert will remove a virus for free

Windows Server is the operating system that bridges on-premises environments with Azure services, enabling hybrid scenarios that maximize existing investments. Increase security and reduce business risk with multiple layers of protection built into the operating system. Evolve your datacenter infrastructure to achieve greater efficiency and scale with Hyper converged Infrastructure. Enable developers and IT pros to create cloud native applications and modernize their traditional apps using containers and micro-services.

Resident Evil Requiem introduces a groundbreaking chapter in the survival horror genre, delivering the most immersive installment in the legendary Resident Evil series. Step into the role of FBI analyst Grace Ashcroft to face relentless terror, or join seasoned agent Leon S. Kennedy in adrenaline-filled action.

Their distinct paths and gameplay styles intertwine into an intense, suspenseful adventure that will leave you breathless and haunt you long after the game ends.

products.productName: Grand Theft Auto V (GTA 5) PC - Rockstar Key
products.details:
One of the biggest action-adventure games awaits you with its huge world, interesting gameplay, rich story, and memorable characters. Take control over Franklin, Trevor, and Michael and make your dreams come true in San Andreas.

Grand Theft Auto V is an action-adventure game where you can roam the open world as much as you wish and complete the story missions which additionally unlock gameplay mechanics. You decide how you’re going to lead your character, either getting to the top of the richest people in Los Santos or to the very bottom with the gangs and organized crime.
